elements.description: A simple cartoon question mark icon in the center of a pure white background, surrounded by faint circular lines suggesting thought or consideration. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A cartoon dollar bill with a frowning face and a red cross mark over it, placed in the top-left corner of a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A cartoon hand holding a stack of dollar bills, positioned in the bottom-left corner of a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A cartoon dollar bill with a neutral expression, placed in the top-right corner of a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A cartoon person with a neutral expression holding a dollar bill, positioned slightly below the top-right corner of a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
